content.fact_text: Production-ready Kafka infrastructure provider with support for SSL, SASL, HMAC signing, Opossum circuit breakers, and structured JSON logging.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a Kafka producer with idempotent configuration, manages a consumer cluster, applies Opossum circuit breakers to I/O, enforces HMAC-SHA256 integrity, scrubs PII for logging, and handles graceful process termination.
interfaces: public publish(topic: string, key: string, message: any, headers?: Record<string, any>): Promise<void>
public createConsumer(groupId: string, topic: string, handler: (payload: EachMessagePayload) => Promise<void>): Promise<Consumer>
public verifySignature(payload: any, signature: string): boolean
public scrubPiI(data: Record<string, any>): Record<string, any>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a production-grade interface for robust, event-driven messaging with built-in security, circuit breaking, and observability.
